text: Airbnb reported Q2 2025 earnings on August 7, 2025, beating EPS estimates by 9.5% with revenues rising year-over-year C012, C020. Revenue reached $3.096B in Q2 2025, representing 36.27% YoY growth compared to Q2 2024's $2.748B K001. Net income surged to $642M, up 316.88% YoY from $555M in Q2 2024 K002. Despite the earnings beat, shares dropped approximately 7% on the news as the company issued margin warnings for Q3 and Q4 2025 C020, C019. The stock continued to underperform the broader market into August 11, 2025 C001.
